programme.title: Four Christmases

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: On June 3, 2017, 25-year-old former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner is confronted by FBI agents arriving at her home to question her suspected role in the mishandling of classified information. Based on true events, the film’s dialogue is directly from the transcript of their tense and transfixing conversation.

programme.desc: After Ben easily dispatches the Weatherheads, Team Tennyson travels to a ski resort for some fun in the snow, but when Ben runs into the Weatherheads yet again, this time they are a force to reckon with, now that Kevin 11 has used his Bootleg powers to unlock their emotional controls!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Ben sees Vin Ethanol impressed with Kevin's automotive know-how, Ben's jealousy has him convinced that he has to out-do Kevin before the older boy influences Vin to embrace his bad-guy side at a charity race.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: All Ben wants to do is stop Queen Bee from robbing a bank, but when Kevin shows up to try and be the hero and take all the glory himself, Ben will need to save the day twice or end up in hot honey.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: At a poetry slam event, Charmcaster's reading of Kevin's poetry causes magical trouble for Ben and Gwen, causing mind swaps that have everyone confused as to who's fighting who.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen look for the infamous Bojamboo (the Bigfoot of the South) and discover that it's actually the FORGETI - at the same time as Kevin 11 - but when Ben and Kevin are blasted with the Forgeti's forgetfulness mist, they reverse roles and it's up to Gwen and Max to restore them back to normal.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! to the Movies

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and wild dragons, a Viking teenager’s world is turned upside down when he is challenged by an unusual dragon.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.desc: The sequel to the comedic blockbuster continues to follows Max and gang as they take on new adventures and find the courage to become their own heroes.

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie
programme.desc: The Rugrats are lost in a forest and must put their heads together to find their way home.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: Wifelike
programme.desc: Designed to behave like the late wife of a detective, an artificial human questions her reality as memories of a past life begin to resurface.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: Paul and his twin teenage sons, Thomas and Joseph, have been living a half-life – tranquility by day and torment by night.

programme.title: Hamnet
programme.desc: HAMNET tells the powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare’s timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

programme.title: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: Based on Ray Bradbury's novel of the same name, this film is set in a future where the media is outlawed, history is rewritten and 'firemen' burn books.

programme.title: Samjin Company English Class
programme.desc: In the mid-1990s in South Korea, three female office co-workers who enroll in English classes in hopes to advance their careers, struggle to expose the corruption inside their company.

programme.title: Innocence
programme.desc: A hotshot lawyer uncovers the conspiracy of a small village while defending her estranged mother, who has Alzheimer's disease and accused of killing the attendees at her husband’s funeral.

programme.title: Mr. Zoo: The Missing Vip
programme.desc: After discovering he can suddenly talk to animals, an intelligence agent partners with a canine pal to handle a case that has gone sideways.

programme.title: Boy in the Pool
programme.desc: Seok-young bumps into Woo-ju and they get closer after Woo-ju saves her from drowning. They lost touch after Woo-ju moves to Seoul to be a swimmer. Will they be able to meet again?

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep7
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep8
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Hear Me: Our Summer
programme.desc: Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifter deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates South Korea’s largest crime organization and spends eight years rising in the ranks. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Assassin Sook-hee is recruited as a sleeper agent with the promise of freedom after ten years of service. But after secrets from her past destroy her normal life, she decides to take revenge.

programme.title: Sisters on the Road
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Myung-eun meets her sister Myung-ju. They do not share the same father and decided to travel together to find Myung-eun's father. A secret of her father reveals...

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Eun-yi is hired as a nanny in an lavish mansion by businessman Hoon and his pregnant wife, Hae-ra. When Eun-yi is seduced by the father of the house, she becomes the unwitting victim in a series of traps laid by the women of the house. Eun-yi must now outwit and escape the vicious family to protect her sanity and her life.

programme.title: Mal-Mo-E: The Secret Mission
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation in the 1940s, two men work together to secretly create a dictionary of the Korean language when the language was banned.

programme.title: Office
programme.desc: The investigation following a sales manager brutally killing his entire family leads to a track of mystery and tragedy in an overwhelmed work team at Seoul.

programme.title: The Odd Family: Zombie on Sale
programme.desc: When a pharmaceutical company's illegal experiments inadvertently create a zombie, the quirky Park family discovers an interesting side effect to the virus and tries to profit from it.

programme.desc: As a popular actress has growing discontentment towards her marriage, she begins planning to kill her rich husband with her neighbor.

programme.desc: Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifter deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.

programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: An old huntsman risks his life to protect a village girl from a group of treasure hunters after they witness the men commit murder.

programme.title: Road to Boston
programme.desc: A group of marathoners want to run proudly under the Korean flag after Korea's liberation. Though they couldn't afford a pair of sneakers, they embark on an unforgettable journey to Boston.

programme.title: The Noisy Mansion
programme.desc: Geo-ul moves into the mysterious apartment plagued by unexplained floor noise. Determined to solve the mystery, she faces unexpected challenges while uncovering the apartment's secrets.

programme.title: Love, Lies
programme.desc: A gisaeng is consumed by jealousy after her friend finds success as a pop singer and her lover falls for her. Feeling betrayed, things begin to fall apart as she tries to regain the things she lost.

programme.title: Bottom of the Water
programme.desc: Ga-young's sister died six year ago. One day, Ga-young is chased by a vengeful water spirit who appears as her sister. She strives to solve the mystery of her sister's tragic death.

programme.title: Crazy Romance

programme.desc: Prison is a hell where only the strong survive. Under Hwang's reign, the peace in prison can be maintained. The newcomer Han breaks the peace and reveals the hidden secrets there...

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: An ordinary man who has never known love, struggles to talk to his crush who goes to work on the same bus as him every day. Things started to change when he acquires a strange perfume that has the power to attract women...

programme.title: The Noisy Mansion
programme.desc: Geo-ul moves into the mysterious apartment plagued by unexplained floor noise. Determined to solve the mystery, she faces unexpected challenges while uncovering the apartment's secrets.

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates a family, placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.

programme.title: Bear Man

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: Gyeong-Ah's Daughter
programme.desc: After her husband passed away, Gyeong-ah relies on her daughter Yeon-su. But they barely meet each other. One day, Gyeong-ah gets an anonymous message about Yeon-su and goes into trauma...

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: It's Okay
programme.desc: The movie follows In-yong, an ever-optimistic girl who loses her mother in a car accident, struggles to stay strong on her own. As she is kicked out because of her overdue rent, she finds support from her teacher, her classmate and a pharmacist friend to overcome hardship.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: Ruthless
programme.desc: A high school coach, whose teenage daughter was murdered, takes matters into his own hands by going after the men who kidnapped his student for their human trafficking operation.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

programme.title: The Master (2013)
programme.desc: When martial arts master Chen Xiang refuses to join the armies of the Qing Prince, his mother and his students are seized. To save them, Chen has only one path: all-out war.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: Seoulgoedam (literally meaning “Seoul Ghost Stories”), is a horror anthology film that focuses on Korean folklore that has been passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: Taken from Rio Bravo
programme.desc: In 1874 Texas, two friends and an Indian scout rescue kidnapped women from sadistic traffickers near the Mexican border.

programme.title: Gunfight At Rio Bravo
programme.desc: A mysterious Russian gunslinger aids a marshal and a sheriff in a standoff with a bloodthirsty outlaw gang known as The Hellhounds who have invaded their small East Texas town.

programme.title: Hostiles
programme.desc: In 1892, a legendary Army Captain reluctantly agrees to escort a Cheyenne chief and his family through dangerous territory.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, must ensure the safety of an informant in possession of sensitive information

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, must ensure the safety of an informant in possession of sensitive information

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Two mobile restaurant owners team up with their detective friend to save the beautiful woman who was a pickpocket.

programme.title: Woman in Black 2
programme.desc: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, a group of children evacuated from WWII London arrive, awakening the house's darkest inhabitant.

programme.title: Monsters: Dark Continent
programme.desc: Ten years on from the events of Monsters, and the 'Infected Zones' have now spread worldwide. The Army decide to draft in more numbers to help deal with this insurgency.

programme.title: The First Vampire
programme.desc: Vietnam's first ever vampire movie. In a modern fantasy world, five young women gather to compete for a life-changing opportunity, unaware of a bloodthirsty plan that awaits them.

programme.title: Death Forest and Death Forest 2
programme.desc: The students of a school go on a trip not knowing what's in there can I survive The mysterious ghost of the forest and just like that it's a bloody massacre.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Story of a pimp who became a member of a revolutionary group after saving its leader

programme.title: The Policeman'S Lineage
programme.desc: A criminal drama of the very different two policemen handling a huge case together shakes the police organization.

programme.title: The Hitman'S Bodyguard
programme.desc: The world's top bodyguard gets a new client, a hitman who must testify at the International Criminal Court. They must put their differences aside and work together to make it to the trial on time.

programme.title: Due Justice
programme.desc: An attorney with a military past hunts down the gang who killed his wife and brother and took his daughter.

programme.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: Never Here
programme.desc: Disturbing events lead an artist who photographs strangers to suspect that someone out there is watching HER. Boundaries blur between real and imaginary, crime and art, the watcher and the watched.

programme.title: City War
programme.desc: Two cops – both partners and best friends – find their friendship and their lives at stake when they try to take down a ruthless drug dealer

programme.title: Kill Chain
programme.desc: A deadly shootout between two hitmen erupts into an evening of murder, betrayal and revenge amongst a gang of crooked police, assassins and mercenaries.

programme.title: By Quantum Physics: A Nightlife Venture
programme.desc: The story is about a night club owner Lee Chan-woo, his club manager Seong Eun-yeong, and police reporter Park ki-hum that fights with an organized crime which involved alleged drug abuse and police corruption.

programme.title: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: On loan from Chicago mafia to Detroit underworld, a thief gets double-crossed by the Detroit boss, and, after barely escaping, vows to take revenge

programme.title: Kruel
programme.desc: A psychotic killer masquerades as an ice cream man in order to get closer to the objects of his affection.

programme.title: King of Beggars
programme.desc: A rich family's son falls in love with a woman who will only marry him once he becomes a Kung-Fu Master. In this 'Dramedy' He becomes a legendary hero, by attempting to save the emperor, during his true quest of love.

programme.title: The Informer
programme.desc: Because of a failed drug bust, An FBI informant intentionally gets himself incarcerated again in order to infiltrate the mob at a maximum security prison

programme.title: Legendary Amazons
programme.desc: In early 11th century China, the Song Dynasty is being invaded by armies of the rival state Western Xia. Yang, the last of a long line of Song generals, is killed and his widowed wife Mu leads other widows into battle to save their dynasty.

programme.title: Saving Mr. Wu
programme.desc: Police race against time after criminals posing as cops kidnap a Hong Kong movie star and threaten to kill him.

programme.title: Secret Zoo
programme.desc: A lawyer and zookeepers disguised themselves as animals in order to save a zoo from getting shut down.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Framed for a terrorist bombing, a foreign service officer must dodge a top assassin, while racing against time to thwart a deadly plot.

programme.title: Glorious Days
programme.desc: A group of five girls and one boy becomes Highschool best friends since high school. 23 years later, one of them lay dying in a hospital. She hopes she could see all five of her old friends for the last time.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Undercover cop enlists his childhood friends to travel to Japan to help him catch a Yakuza group.

programme.title: The Way of the Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: A musical drama about a wife who asks her husband to help her find her childhood sweetheart as a birthday present. Though reluctant, her husband's only choice is to set out on this journey with her.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: An American sharpshooter engages in a deadly game of cat and mouse with an Iraqi sniper, who has him pinned behind a small chunk of concrete.

programme.title: Dosukoi Love
programme.desc: Overweight, Ayane Sukehira went to Italy for chocolates. After an accident, found herself totally changed. She went back to Japan and begins to work as an esthetician.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In Japan's southern islands of Kyushu and Shikoku, Adam Liaw finds a vibrant, warm culture where the cuisine is as fascinating as its people.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam ends his taste tour through Japan with a trip to the island of Okinawa, where he discovers an eclectic cuisine and learns the secret to long life.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the coastal city of Durban - where he’s staying at the iconic Oyster Box hotel.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In Durban, Warren visits the famous restaurant Max’s Lifestyle for an indulgent Shisa Nyama experience, before meeting with local guide Thoko to visit a nearby Zulu village.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Kruger National Park, one of South Africa’s largest game reserves, where he’s staying at the renowned Sabi Sabi lodge.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In the heart of the Kalahari Desert, Warren spots a myriad of African animals, and learns to make traditional rusks to go with his morning coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Uncle King Julien abdicates his throne, handing off his crown to Prince Julien. Let the reign of King Julien the Thirteenth begin.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien learns that 99% of the lemurs love him, so he makes it his mission to find and convert his one "hater."

programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In the season opener, George and Harold have returned to school due to a technicality, but the school has been taken over by Melvin and a cyborg Melvin from the future! Their goal is to make the school extremely difficult by replacing all the teachers with Teachertron robots. Suffering under the new regime and without Mr. Krupp/Captain Underpants on hand to help, the boys hypnotize gym teacher Mr. Meaner and turn him into Sergeant Boxers to fight back.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Tired of the Melvins ruling the school, the boys realize that they need Mr. Krupp to make the school at least bearable. programme.desc: Dimension Demented When Ra tries to bring a jukebox to school by stuffing it into the Dimension Tube, he ends up sending himself on a terrifying inter-dimensional journey. programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe accidentally knocks Harper's soccer cleat off the balcony before the big game, the Dew Drops must venture into the city to retrieve the cleat. / When Dylan starts practicing magic tricks, Athena thinks his magic is real! But when the Dew Drops investigate his “magic hat,” they accidentally break it and must fix it before Dylan’s magic show for the neighborhood kids.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus is having his first sleepover and Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever. / When Athena’s magical jump rope gets sucked up by the family’s new robot vacuum, she loses confidence in her abilities, only to learn that her real abilities are already inside her.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better – now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it’s time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: In Wanted, a slacker is recruited by a secret assassin fraternity, uncovering hidden powers and dark truths as he trains under elite killers, including Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: The Coca Cola Kid
programme.desc: A smug sales executive treks to Australia to improve regional sales and becomes embroiled in sexual and professional shenanigans.

programme.title: Kill Cruise
programme.desc: When a washed-out German sailor in a drunken state agrees to take two British women from Gibraltar to the West Indies in his sailboat, they realize that it’s not going to be smooth sailing, and it will take all their wits to survive the trip.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A South African gold mine foreman is unwittingly manipulated by an unscrupulous gang of financiers who want to flood the mine to raise the price of gold on the world market.

programme.title: Meteor Part 1
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can’t see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: The Odyssey: The Making Of An Epic
programme.desc: Director Christopher Nolan invites you into the world of The Odyssey, his mythic action epic of Homer’s saga, and the first film shot entirely with IMAX Film Cameras.

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can’t see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: The Triangle Part 1
programme.desc: A shipping magnate hires four experts from various fields to investigate what happened to his ships that went missing in the Bermuda Triangle. The team discovers a threat that might unravel time itself and cause the world to end.

programme.title: Ben Fogle's Chinese Adventure 1
programme.desc: Ben dives into China's history, culture and fast-paced modern life, from the ancient Great Wall to bustling Shanghai.

programme.title: Griff's Great American South 1
programme.desc: Griff explores Charleston's charm, Civil War history, and the legacy of slavery.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles 2
programme.desc: Nick's train leaves from Tangier and it's a special one; Al Boraq, which speeds along the high-speed line making its way down the west coast. At its fastest Al Boraq reaches nearly 200 mph and is run entirely on wind power. The ambition is to run Morocco's entire railway system on green energy within the next two years.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys 1
programme.desc: A tiny chameleon faces the journey of a lifetime in a Madagascan forest, and a water vole in Scotland swims across a loch and scales a mountain to find new territory and a mate.

programme.title: Wild Japan 1
programme.desc: The wild Japanese island of Honshu hosts an astonishing array of wildlife, and it's a place where people and nature co-exist in the most unexpected ways.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy 2
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Piedmont, the region that made the dream of a unified Italy a reality.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in a dystopian 2050, two detectives investigate a string of mysterious murders in a world choked by pollution and pandemics. They soon discover a sinister cult and a deadly ninja assassin behind the carnage, forcing them into a desperate battle to save what remains of society.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: After dining at a local restaurant, Rachael decides to create her own version of their special dish: Wild Boar Ragu served over Kale Pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael makes her version of squid ink pasta, prepared with fresh, local calamari, and served on a bed of "tuxedo pasta."

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Angie, the wife of a charismatic pastor who extols family values yet maintains an icy demeanour toward his own, seeks solace from her marital woes in the arms of her recently hired pool boy.

programme.title: Trapped In Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a classmate's adoration turns into a dangerous obsession, college student Erin finds herself held captive in her own dorm room during Spring Break.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Forty of the country’s best home cooks are ready to show the judges what they’ve got. Tonight, twenty have 90 minutes to cook their dream dish in order to win one of the ten aprons on offer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Another twenty home cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen to make their dream dishes. For those who miss out, there will be one final chance to compete for the last four aprons tomorrow.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Aussie Rock legend Jimmy Barnes and wife Jane set this season’s first mystery box, inspiring the Top 24 competitors with seasonal ingredients they love to cook with from their garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Veronica has a huge mango-sized growth on her back that has taken away her zest for life and desire for camping. Dr. Lyndsey returns to help Dr. Lee shape former golf pro Ken's lumpy, bumpy nose.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Trying to save their marriage, Becky and Jim head to a couple's retreat which just so happens to include Becky's ex. Things only get worse when one of the guests goes missing and their host is found dead.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: Madelyn and her daughter Mia have always had a tight bond. But when Mia starts spending more time with her boyfriend and is about to leave for college, Madelyn is panicked by her emerging independence.

programme.title: A Kidnapping In Amish Country
programme.desc: When Amish woman Lena realises her daughter has been abducted, she is forced to turn to the only person who can help: her estranged best friend Skye, who has renounced the Amish way of life.

programme.title: Trapped In Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a classmate's adoration turns into a dangerous obsession, college student Erin finds herself held captive in her own dorm room during Spring Break.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Angie, the wife of a charismatic pastor who extols family values yet maintains an icy demeanour toward his own, seeks solace from her marital woes in the arms of her recently hired pool boy.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Bill's swinging-arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams. Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant sense of style.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah's mom is concerned that he is ignoring the large, growing lump over his lower spine.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a soulful Southern twist on steak Diane, a pan-fried beef steak, by adding Cajun spices to the marinade and serving it with foie gras and Creole dirty rice.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Trying to save their marriage, Becky and Jim head to a couple's retreat which just so happens to include Becky's ex. Things only get worse when one of the guests goes missing and their host is found dead.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar's got a steal of a deal in Port Richey. But after they pull up to this 90s Era Time capsule, they discover that vandals, roaches, and water damage have had their way with the interior.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The cooks are excited to discover the Invention Test. In 75 minutes, they must take a pantry staple and turn it into something extraordinary. The bottom five will face an elimination cook-off tomorrow.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The bottom five cooks from yesterday face off in a Pressure Test set by MasterChef favourite Maggie Beer. They must master her signature sour-cream pastry in a high-stakes pie challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: It’s Family Favourites week and social media sensation Andy Cooks (chef Andy Hearnden) is on the hunt for the ultimate breakfast in an Immunity Challenge cook-off, with 60 minutes on the clock.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In a high-stakes elimination challenge, contestants are tasked with reinventing the judges’ quick carb recipes into unique, elevated dishes in a 36-minute cook.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: It’s the first team challenge of the competition. Each team must cook a family feast featuring two mains, three sides and one dessert, a big ask in only 75 minutes.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: A forehead bump has destroyed Tana's business aspirations. Dr. Lee teaches eager dermatology intern Dr. Hannah Tolson how to remove Foday's mystery bumps, which have been named Mama and Baby.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.desc: Beyond just accumulating frequent flier miles, Theresa's journey has been one of personal growth and transformation. She offers viewers a rare glimpse behind-the-scenes from her travels.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Bryan has a genetic condition that may be causing the huge mystery bumps on his head. Chalamar cannot dress how she wants because of her ugly chest bump, which she dubs "a turd".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: It’s the first team challenge of the competition. Each team must cook a family feast featuring two mains, three sides and one dessert, a big ask in only 75 minutes.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is joined by husband John, as she shows how to prepare a chicken and fig dish, featured on their wedding menu. Meanwhile, Rachael's sister Maria makes a one-bowl carrot cake.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team are taking on new partners: ambitious real-estate developers Shannon and Christian, who are eager to make their mark. They've found an abandoned mid-century home, hoping to restore it.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: It's Seyun's birthday during their trip to Singapore. To celebrate, they decide to stay in a nice hotel for one night. But what consequences will Seyun’s statement bring?

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: This time, it’s a team mission to portray a heated love triangle. With no script, the actors must create their own storyline and dialogue in just five hours. On top of that, a surprise judge arrives.

programme.desc: A forehead bump has destroyed Tana's business aspirations. Dr. Lee teaches eager dermatology intern Dr. Hannah Tolson how to remove Foday's mystery bumps, which have been named Mama and Baby.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: As the team performs a massive, multi-focused experiment, they complete an operation that may reveal the ultimate answers on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From explosions that eviscerate entire forests, to lakes that explode with lethal gas, to earthquakes that could have been triggered by humans, are some of Earth’s deadliest catastrophes truly unnatural?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From the Johnstown flood to the Indonesian tsunami, discover how water’s power can transform into an unstoppable agent of death.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the outrageous toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up, as we uncover explosive science kits and more.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: Relics from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ have fascinated the faithful for 2000 years—from the wooden cross and iron nails to the crown of thorns. But do these sacred artefacts still exist?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: When a seller whips into the shop with an 'Energy Dome' hat made for the band DEVO, will Rick's offer top the charts? Then, Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Deep beneath the sands of Egypt lie 24 enormous sarcophagi—and every one of them is empty. What purpose might these giant tombs have served? And is it possible that they were designed by alien visitors?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: In Arizona, Mike relives the thrill of speedway history thanks to a motorbike-loving family of adrenaline junkies and their garage full of one-of-a-kind racing mementos.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From colossal walls and giant stone tombs to temples carved from solid rock, how did ancient civilisations achieve feats of engineering that still defy modern understanding?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As pressure mounts in the swamp, Troy and Pickle risk their lives in the oil fields. Joey and Zak attempt to knock Mr Daniel off his throne, but the Edgar Patriarch refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: While digging a massive steel shaft in the Money Pit area, the Lagina brothers and their team make a discovery that could help prove the legends about buried treasure to be true.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: As the tide begins to turn against the Axis powers, the leaders of Germany and Japan deploy opposite strategies on their home fronts.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Resistance to Nazi occupation and oppression is a constant throughout the war, with results both triumphant and devastating.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: From a coastal cleanup plan that ends with an earth-shaking surprise to a fugitive’s fiery fix for an unexpected problem, these are the real-life moments when people thought way outside the box.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: There are some strongholds built to protect the sacred. But there are others used for more sinister purposes. In this episode, we uncover the stories behind some of the world's most imposing structures.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: When a seller whips into the shop with an 'Energy Dome' hat made for the band DEVO, will Rick's offer top the charts? Then, Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: In L.A., Mike and Robbie head back to a fifth-generation demo business and junkyard that's piled so deep that most of its treasures are out of reach.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: Brimming with a perspective of Taiwanese cuisine, Chris returns to his restaurant, Yumpling, based in New York. Joined by Yumpling’s co-founders, Chris dives into the stories behind Yumpling’s creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: A scientist and businessman team up to develop a vitamin C-rich war ration for the troops fighting in World War 2, which unexpectedly leads to the development of frozen concentrated orange juice.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime needs to reach the airport in Coron, but first, she must scale a cliff, dive for wrecks and get past a herd of stubborn cows.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime arrives in Batanes and is introduced to the unique culture of the Ivatan tribe with a mad dash for a cow!
